name: runpod-serverless
description: Ship any FastAPI + GPU inference service to RunPod Serverless as a production-grade LOAD_BALANCER endpoint. Covers image-based immutable releases, HF FlashBoot model caching, integrity gating against answer-injection, propose-review-judge agent runtime, red-team canary scoring, scaler-cascade drain, and the 24 pitfalls learned from LAMP1 (canonical guide: C:/Users/innas/runpod_serverless_setup_guide.md).
